title: Add Primbon Jawa & Kalender Pasaran Jawa to learn
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: A new sprout: Primbon Jawa
gist.blurb: The greenhouse just got a touch of traditional Javanese wisdom! A new community app brings modern Javanese calendars, Weton calculations, and script conversions to the hive.
gist.summary: Added 'Primbon Jawa & Kalender Pasaran Jawa' to the community showcase, featuring Javanese calendar calculations and script conversions.
gist.impact: Users can now explore traditional Javanese forecasting and calendar systems built by the community.
gist.visual_concept: A digital greenhouse setting representing the community showcase. The bee mascot interacting with a traditional calendar or scroll, blending ancient Javanese wisdom (stars, moons, script) with modern code-plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot in a glowing digital greenhouse, reading a traditional scroll with glowing symbols. Small code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots around her, with soft pastel glowing stars and moons floating in the air. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
